name: Belcando Dog Puppy Food – Junior Maxi – 12.5KG
shortDescription: BELCANDO Junior Maxi is a premium dry puppy food specially developed for young dogs of large breeds from 4 months of age. Carefully formulated with high-quality poultry protein, digestible rice, and essential nutrients, this complete puppy food supports controlled growth, strong bones, healthy joints, and optimal digestion.
description: Designed specifically for large breed puppies, BELCANDO® Junior Maxi provides balanced nutrition that helps support healthy muscle development while preventing overly rapid growth that can place stress on developing joints and bones. Why Choose BELCANDO® Junior Maxi? Supports Controlled Growth in Large Breed Puppies Large breed puppies require carefully balanced nutrition to support healthy skeletal and muscular development. BELCANDO® Junior Maxi contains the ideal balance of protein, fat, and calcium to encourage steady, healthy growth from 4 months onwards. High-Quality Poultry Protein Made with 30% fresh poultry meat and 13% dried poultry protein, this nutrient-rich recipe provides essential amino acids that help build lean muscle and maintain healthy body condition during development. Easy to Digest With highly digestible rice (18%) and carefully selected natural ingredients, this formula is gentle on sensitive puppy stomachs and supports excellent nutrient absorption. Healthy Bones & Joint Support Balanced calcium and phosphorus levels help support proper bone growth and joint development, making it ideal for larger breed puppies with slower growth rates. Skin & Coat Health Enriched with chia seeds, linseed, poultry fat, and natural oils, BELCANDO® Junior Maxi supplies omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids that help maintain healthy skin and a soft, shiny coat. Natural Immune & Digestive Support Brewers’ yeast, dried beet pulp, and hydrolysed gelatine help support healthy digestion, gut flora balance, and natural immunity. Key Benefits of BELCANDO® Junior Maxi Premium puppy food for large breed dogs from 4 months 30% fresh poultry meat for healthy muscle development Balanced protein and fat levels for controlled growth Supports healthy bones and joints Gentle on digestion with rice and natural fibres Omega fatty acids for healthy skin and coat Natural ingredients with excellent digestibility No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives Made with carefully selected premium ingredients Main Ingredients BELCANDO Junior Maxi is made with high-quality ingredients including: Fresh poultry meat (30%) Rice (18%) Poultry protein (13%) Fodder oat flour Dried eggs Fish meal from sea fish Brewers’ yeast Chia seeds Linseed Hydrolysed gelatine Poultry fat Beet pulp   Nutritional Analysis Nutrient Amount Protein 24.5% Fat Content 13.0% Crude Ash 7.0% Crude Fibre 2.8% Moisture 10.0% Calcium 1.1% Phosphorus 0.95% Sodium 0.3%   Added Vitamins & Minerals This premium puppy formula contains essential nutrients to support healthy development, including: Vitamin A Vitamin D3 Vitamin E Iron Zinc Copper Manganese Selenium Iodine Natural tocopherol extracts (Vitamin E) are included as natural antioxidants to help preserve freshness and nutritional quality. Ideal for Large Breed Puppies BELCANDO Junior Maxi is suitable for growing large breed puppies from 4 months of age and provides complete daily nutrition for healthy growth, strong immunity, and long-term vitality. Give your puppy the best nutritional foundation with BELCANDO® Junior Maxi — premium large breed puppy food made for healthy development and lifelong wellbeing.
